name: Penuche/Brown Sugar Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine brown sugar, milk, butter, corn syrup, and salt in a 2-quart microwave-safe bowl.
2. Microwave for 8 to 10 minutes at MED-HIGH (70%) until the mixture reaches the soft ball stage (234°F on a candy thermometer).
3. Cool to 120°F (about 35 to 40 minutes at room temperature). Add vanilla and beat until the mixture holds its shape when dropped from a spoon and begins to lose its gloss.
4. Quickly stir in nuts.
5. Immediately pour into a buttered 8 or 9-inch square pan.
6. Cool completely, then cut into squares once firm.
Yield: 36 pieces or 1 1/4 lbs. Compact microwaves may require substituting high for MED-HIGH (70%).
